All Products

Fiber Optic Systems

FOG components, precision winding machines, and calibration equipment — the complete infrastructure for fiber optic gyroscope production.

Core EquipmentLKF-RH16

Multi-Pole Fiber Coil Winding Machine

Core equipment for manufacturing FOG fiber coils. Supports quadrupole, octupole, and hexadecapole winding. Precise automatic fiber laying with automatic glue coating. Real-time display of winding length, turns, and layers.

Includes: fiber take-up, laying and pay-off devices, tension sensing, coil skeleton fixing spindle, fiber guiding, automatic gluing, industrial control computer + display, HD camera system, 2× standard rewinding spools.

Quadrupole WindingOctupole WindingAutomatic Glue CoatingPrecision Fiber Laying
Request Datasheet
ComponentsFOG Series

Fiber Optic Gyroscope Components

Complete range of FOG optical sub-assemblies and components including PM fiber coils, optical chips, couplers, and source modules. All manufactured in-house with proprietary thin-fiber (135μm) technology for miniaturized FOG solutions.

PM Fiber CoilsOptical ChipsCouplersSource Modules
Request Catalog
EquipmentCalibration Series

Measuring & Calibration Equipment

Precision turntables, rate tables, and environmental testing equipment for FOG and MEMS sensor calibration. Production-grade instruments ensuring every device meets specified performance parameters.

Rate TablesPrecision TurntablesEnvironmental TestingSensor Calibration
Request Specs

Building your own FOG production line?

We supply complete turnkey solutions for fiber optic gyroscope manufacturing.
